content.en:
The Lord of the Mystic will also ask for everyone's opinions, seeing that most of the other shore-level geniuses are willing to leave here and collect the Origin Bamboo Essence of the other side.

So, she agreed.

"Then everyone go to find the Origin Bamboo Pulp on the other side, this magic circle is still here, if you encounter danger, you can also flee to this side!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

The other other shore-level geniuses nodded their heads one after another.

Subsequently.

A group of geniuses at the other side followed the Lord of Mystery into the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side and continued to search for the Origin Bamboo Marrow on the other side.

Soon.

They found the Origin Bamboo Pith on the other side again, and after breaking the Origin Bamboo on the other side, they took out the Origin Bamboo Pith on the other side and handed it over to the Lord of Mystery.

As time passed, they found more and more of the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side, and they were all in a good mood.

Immediately afterwards, they went deeper and deeper into the core area of the original bamboo forest on the other side.

Of course.

Along the way, they also encountered the Void Bamboo Bee attack, but there were not many of them, and they were all eliminated one by one.

Gradually, they all relaxed, thinking that there weren't too many void bees here.

On the other side, deep in the original bamboo forest.

Here, they saw the golden Origin Bamboo on the other side.

You must know that the previous Origin Bamboo on the other side was cyan, and the golden Origin Bamboo on the other side knew at a glance that it was not an ordinary Origin Bamboo on the other side.

The Lord of the Mystic was extremely excited when he saw these Origin Bamboos on the other side.

"This is the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side!"

The Lord of Mystery was shocked.

The other recognizable geniuses on the other side were also shocked one by one.

This is not an ordinary treasure, the value is too high!

"Oh my God, there is the Origin Golden Bamboo !!!! on the other side here"

"I took a look, and there are at least a thousand Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side!"

"The Origin Golden Bamboo on the Other Side has the potential to give birth to the Origin Golden Bamboo Essence on the Other Side, and its value is far beyond the ordinary Origin Bamboo Essence on the Other Side, and the effect is many times greater!"

"It's not just the other side of the Origin Golden Bamboo Marrow, just the Other Shore Origin Golden Bamboo itself is valuable, the ordinary Other Shore Origin Bamboo is of very low value, but the other side of the Origin Golden Bamboo can be used to refine the Origin Rule Weapon. So many Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side, all of them can be scraped away, and they can be used to refine a lot of Origin Rule weapons!"

"We'll cut down all these Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side, and when the time comes, when the time comes, the Lord of the Mystic should give us a little!"

While these other shore-level geniuses were discussing, the Lord of Xuan Miao said: "Okay, cut down all the other side origin golden bamboos here, and after going out, every other shore-level genius will have ten other side origin golden bamboos." "

"Thank you, Lord of Mystery!"

One by one, the other side level geniuses thanked.

Although the Lord of the Mystic is a little distressed, she must give them benefits, otherwise they are not willing to give their lives, and she will be in danger in the next treasure hunt!

Therefore, you can't be stingy, and the benefits that should be given must be given!

"In the past, I cut down the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side, and by the way, see if there is any Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side?"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

Whoa!!!

They passed over one by one and began to look for the Golden Bamboo Marrow of the Origin on the other side.

A thousand Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side are not too many, so it will definitely not be long before they can explore all the Origin Golden Bamboos on the other side.

But suddenly.

Danger is here.

Airplanes!

A golden Void Master Bee flew out from inside a Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side, and its speed far exceeded that of other Void Bamboo Bees.

It directly attacked a Shore-level genius at such a speed that the Shore-level genius didn't even have time to dodge.

Moreover, the defense of the other side level genius was pierced by a single blow.

Burst!!!

That peer-level genius was pierced through his body, and he was immediately hit hard.

"Retreat!"

The Lord of Mystery immediately shouted.

She had never seen this golden Void Bamboo Bee, and she didn't know that there was such a terrifying Void Bamboo Bee here.

If she knew, she would have been careful.

And the other other shore-level geniuses had never heard of such a powerful Void Bamboo Bee, and this was the first time they had heard of it.

In fact, even the information of the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side, they had only heard about it and did not know much.

But in the information, there is no mention that the Origin Golden Bamboo on the other side will hide this golden void bamboo bee!

Whoa!!

One by one, the other side-level geniuses were about to withdraw, but the injured other shore-level genius was slow, and he was targeted by the golden void bamboo bee again.

Burst!!!!

The golden Void Bamboo Bee attacked him again, this time killing him outright.

Another other-level genius has fallen!

Seeing this scene, the faces of all the other side level geniuses changed drastically.

However, something even more terrifying is yet to come.

I saw that one by one the golden Void Bamboo Bees appeared, they seemed to be contemplating at first, and their arrival made this group of Golden Void Bamboo Bees wake up.

"Thirty-six Golden Void Bamboo Bees, there are too many of them, we can't beat them!"

The Lord of the Mystic was also on the run immediately.

And Ye Tian protected the Lord of Mystery, he could not save other geniuses of the other side, but he could not help but save the Lord of Mystery.

If something happens to the Lord of Mystery, he doesn't want to get benefits, and after he goes out, he will also be troubled by the Xiao family.

Therefore, he must keep the Lord of the Mysteries.

Soon.

Two golden void bamboo bees stared at the Lord of Mystery.

Being targeted by this golden void bamboo bee, the Lord of Mystery shivered all over, as if he had fallen into a desperate situation.

But Ye Tian made a move and directly shot away the two Void Bamboo Bees.

"Master of Mystery, come with me!"

With Ye Tian blocking the Golden Void Bamboo Bee, the Lord of Mystery is safe.

Now.

The Lord of Xuan Miao was very glad that the Xiao family had hired Ye Tian, otherwise, she would be in danger this time!

As time passed, Ye Tian escorted the Lord of Xuan Miao out of here.

And the other other shore-level geniuses were unlucky, and they didn't know how many they could escape.

Soon.

Ye Tian escorted the Lord of Xuan Miao back to the Eight Gates Realm Killing Array, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

And other other shore-level geniuses are also fleeing here.

After a long time, there was no movement.

And only thirteen other shore-level geniuses managed to escape back, and the other other shore-level geniuses are estimated to have fallen.

Seeing such a tragic situation, the other other shore-level geniuses shuddered!

At this moment, they even had the idea of abandoning this mission!

After all, this mission is too dangerous!
